underlying_goal: Migrate a Bootstrap web app to Tailwind CSS, but pivot back to Bootstrap-only when migration proves too complex
friction_detail: Repeated misalignment on visual sizing (text too small, wrong positioning) and global CSS conflicts from Bootstrap made the Tailwind utility approach fragile; user explicitly rejected the migration strategy mid-session.
brief_summary: User wanted to migrate Bootstrap to Tailwind, achieved a working toast flash in Tailwind but reverted to Bootstrap after global CSS conflicts and sizing issues made the approach unsustainable.
user_instructions_to_assistant: Siempre validar con Pint, tests y view:cache después de cada cambio
No usar fondos grises ni cards con sombras en partials
Hacer cambios de uno en uno, partial por partial
Analizar si partials se usan antes de migrarlos
